title: byrsonima nemoralis subsp. nemoralis
intro: Byrsonima nemoralis subsp. nemoralis is a species of plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "guanabani" or "cupuaçu" plant. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Byrsonima nemoralis subsp. nemoralis include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
